raw_output_payload.reasoning: We need a bash command to list names of bind functions containing "p". In bash, bind -p lists key bindings. We need to filter names containing "p". Use grep. Command: bind -p | grep -oP '\w+?='? Actually bind -p prints like: "\C-a": beginning-of-line. We want function names? Maybe key names? Use grep -oP '\w+'? Let's just output names containing p: bind -p | grep -oP '\w+' | grep p. But that will list many. Maybe use awk. Simpler: bind -p | grep -oP '\w+' | grep p. Provide command.

Let's just output names containing p: bind -p | grep -oP '\w+' | grep p. But that will list many. Maybe use awk. Simpler: bind -p | grep -oP '\w+' | grep p. Provide command.
